prose: The HOMO-LUMO gap of ethylene was calculated using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') and density fitting enabled, in the gas phase (no implicit solvent), performed in PySCF. The calculation was run on a molecular geometry provided as input (not optimized). The molecule's charge was 0, and its spin multiplicity was 1. SCF converged in 6 iterations. The total energy is -2139.4541 eV (electronic energy). The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy is -7.6155818 eV, and the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy is -0.17986527 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of exactly 7.4357165 eV. No warnings were reported, and the engine assessed the result as trustworthy. Provenance: the calculated value; no experimental reference is offered, but one can be sought if required. The live output log is at '/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpyzmagcut/live.json'. Let me know if you wish to inspect any files
